headline: Top Research Reports for Palantir, Linde and Arista Networks
summary: Today's Research Daily features new research reports on 16 major stocks, including Palantir Technologies Inc. (PLTR), Linde plc (LIN) and Arista Networks, Inc. (ANET), as well as two micro-cap stocks, Comstock Holding Companies, Inc. (CHCI) and United Bancorp, Inc. (UBCP).

headline: The Tech Download: How Russia could profit from Iran war helium supply chain disruption in the chip sector
summary: Helium has emerged as a key focus for the tech sector as industry watchers cast their minds to the implications of a prolonged Iran war.

headline: Is Linde (LIN) Pricing Reflect Its DCF And P/E Signals After Mixed Recent Returns
summary: If you are wondering whether Linde's current share price lines up with its underlying worth, this review will help you make sense of what you are paying for and what you are actually getting. Linde recently closed at US$495.49, with returns of 1.2% over the past week, a 1.7% decline over the past month, 15.5% year to date and 8.1% over the last year, which gives you a mixed snapshot of how the market has been treating the stock. Recent coverage has focused on Linde's role within the broader...
